title: [InstCombine] Fold `(X & Mask) == 0 ? TC : FC -> TC binop (X & Mask)`

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary only mentions ICMP_EQ and ICMP_NE predicates; this test uses ICMP_UGT which normalizes to the pattern but predicate type is not discussed in summary

alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define i16 @icmp_ugt_normalized_to_eq(i16 %x) {
  %mask = and i16 %x, 128
  %sel = or disjoint i16 %mask, 72
  ret i16 %sel
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i16 @icmp_ugt_normalized_to_eq(i16 %x) {
#0:
  %mask = and i16 %x, 128
  %cmp = icmp ugt i16 %mask, 0
  %sel = select i1 %cmp, i16 200, i16 72
  ret i16 %sel
}
=>
define i16 @icmp_ugt_normalized_to_eq(i16 %x) {
#0:
  %mask = and i16 %x, 128
  %sel = or disjoint i16 %mask, 72
  ret i16 %sel
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary emphasizes the Sub example (3 - 128 = -125); this test uses Or operation with asymmetric bit positions (1024 | 256 = 1280) which is not explicitly illustrated in the summary

alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define i32 @or_operation_with_asymmetric_mask(i32 %x) {
  %and = and i32 %x, 256
  %sel = or disjoint i32 %and, 1024
  ret i32 %sel
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i32 @or_operation_with_asymmetric_mask(i32 %x) {
#0:
  %and = and i32 %x, 256
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %and, 0
  %sel = select i1 %cmp, i32 1024, i32 1280
  ret i32 %sel
}
=>
define i32 @or_operation_with_asymmetric_mask(i32 %x) {
#0:
  %and = and i32 %x, 256
  %sel = or disjoint i32 %and, 1024
  ret i32 %sel
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions XOR as one of four supported ops but only provides SUB example (3 - 128 = -125). This test demonstrates XOR specifically (10 ^ 64 = 74) which is not explicitly illustrated in the summary.

alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define i8 @xor_binary_op_pattern(i8 %x) {
  %and = and i8 %x, 64
  %sel = or disjoint i8 %and, 10
  ret i8 %sel
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i8 @xor_binary_op_pattern(i8 %x) {
#0:
  %and = and i8 %x, 64
  %cmp = icmp eq i8 %and, 0
  %sel = select i1 %cmp, i8 10, i8 74
  ret i8 %sel
}
=>
define i8 @xor_binary_op_pattern(i8 %x) {
#0:
  %and = and i8 %x, 64
  %sel = or disjoint i8 %and, 10
  ret i8 %sel
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
